title: adesmia prostrata
intro: Adesmia prostrata, also known as "cañoto" or "yerba cañoto", is a plant species native to the Andean regions of South America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Adesmia prostrata include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and wound healer. Herbal preparations of Adesmia prostrata can be found in tea, infusion, and tincture forms, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
